race.comment: DIVAKARA (6) loves racing at this circuit with two wins and five seconds from just eight spins and will be better for that first-up hit-out at Doomben. Sure to be right there when the whips are cracking. LINTHORPE LUCK (10) got a well-deserved victory over this course and distance last time out and gets in well at the weights with the 1.5kg claim. Can go back-to-back without surprising. NOVEMBER AIR (12) has placed two from two over this mile journey and hails from an astute barn. Nicely placed to give this a mighty shake. THE IRISH (5) is a stayer resuming who should be hitting the line with gusto. ZAHER (3) next in line.
